recommendations.rationale: Tencent is holding above its 20-day average but remains below its 60-day average with weak volume, so the setup is not confirmed.
evidence: Latest close 519.0 HKD is above ma20 501.925 but below ma60 536.075.
1-day move was -0.67%, making Tencent the weakest item in the snapshot.
Volume ratio to 20-day average was 0.5597, indicating below-average participation.
risks: Continued weakness below the 60-day average may keep the stock range-bound or drifting lower.
Low volume reduces confidence that buyers are accumulating the dip.
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only if price reclaims the 60-day average with above-average volume; avoid if it breaks below the recent 60-day range low.
